title: CSS Layout & Styling
summary: Lists, flexbox, grid, positioning, and float for page layout.

examples.title: CSS list-style-type
examples.description: What: list-style-type changes bullet or number style on <ul> and <ol> lists. When: Customize menus, steps, or feature lists. Try: Change disc to square or decimal to lower-roman.

files.html:
Subjects

  • HTML
  • CSS
  • JavaScript

Steps

  1. Open editor
  2. Write code
  3. Run in browser

examples.title: Flexbox layout
examples.description: What: display: flex arranges child items in a row or column; gap, justify-content, and align-items control spacing and alignment. When: Nav bars, button rows, and centered content. Try: Add a fourth link or change justify-content to center.

files.html:
Home Lessons About
Centered with flex

examples.title: CSS Grid layout
examples.description: What: display: grid creates rows and columns; grid-template-columns sets column sizes; gap adds space between cells. When: Card galleries, dashboards, and equal-width columns. Try: Change to repeat(2, 1fr) for two columns.

examples.title: Positioning
examples.description: What: static is default; relative moves from normal position; absolute is placed inside a relative parent; fixed stays on screen when scrolling. When: Badges, tooltips, sticky buttons, and overlays. Try: Change .badge from absolute to fixed.

files.html:
static
relative (top: 10px)
absolute
fixed

examples.title: CSS float
examples.description: What: float: left or right lets an element sit to one side while text wraps around it. clear: both stops wrapping below floated items. When: Images beside paragraphs (older layout; flex/grid are often better today). Try: Change float from left to right.

files.html:
Float left

Text wraps around the floated box. Float was common before flexbox and grid. For new layouts, prefer flex or grid — but you may see float in older code and textbooks.

This paragraph uses clear: both so it appears below the float.

practice.description: Build a small page layout: flexbox nav bar at the top and a 3-column grid of cards below.
